languages.text: "Интерполирую зону неопределенности... Вычисление не дает ясных результатов. Но откуда интерес к моей карте воспоминаний? Вам знакомы некоторые из ее ключевых точек?"

traits.locale_text: драфт: настораживается, а что с ним не так?

languages.text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"
languages.original_text: "Интерполирую зону неопределенности... Вычисление не дает ясных результатов. Но откуда интерес к моей карте воспоминаний? Вам знакомы некоторые из ее ключевых точек?"

traits.locale_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"
"Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"
"Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

languages.text: “正在对不确定区域进行插值计算……计算结果尚不明确。不过，你为何对我的记忆图谱感兴趣？你是否知晓其中某些关键的数据点？”
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: “正在对不确定区域进行插值计算……计算结果尚不明确。不过，你为何对我的记忆图谱感兴趣？你是否知晓其中某些关键的数据点？”

languages.text: « Interpolation d'un domaine d'incertitude... Les calculs ne produisent pas de résultat explicite. Mais pourquoi vous intéressez-vous à ma carte mémorielle ? Connaissez-vous certains de ses points de données clés ? »
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: « Interpolation d'un domaine d'incertitude... Les calculs ne produisent pas de résultat explicite. Mais pourquoi vous intéressez-vous à ma carte mémorielle ? Connaissez-vous certains de ses points de données clés ? »

languages.text: "Belirsizlik alanının ara değer hesabı... Hesaplama net sonuçlar vermiyor. Ancak hafıza haritama duyduğunuz bu ilginin sebebi nedir? Kilit veri noktalarının bazılarına aşina mısınız?"
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: "Belirsizlik alanının ara değer hesabı... Hesaplama net sonuçlar vermiyor. Ancak hafıza haritama duyduğunuz bu ilginin sebebi nedir? Kilit veri noktalarının bazılarına aşina mısınız?"

languages.text: «Interpolando un área de incertidumbre... El cálculo no produce resultados claros. ¿Por qué el interés por mi mapa de memoria? ¿Conoce alguno de sus puntos de datos clave?».
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: «Interpolando un área de incertidumbre... El cálculo no produce resultados claros. ¿Por qué el interés por mi mapa de memoria? ¿Conoce alguno de sus puntos de datos clave?».

languages.text: "Interpoliere einen Unsicherheitsbereich ... Die Berechnung liefert keine eindeutigen Ergebnisse. Aber warum interessiert Ihr Euch für meine Speicherbänke? Seid Ihr mit einigen ihrer zentralen Datenpunkte vertraut?"
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: "Interpoliere einen Unsicherheitsbereich ... Die Berechnung liefert keine eindeutigen Ergebnisse. Aber warum interessiert Ihr Euch für meine Speicherbänke? Seid Ihr mit einigen ihrer zentralen Datenpunkte vertraut?"

languages.text: 「不確実性の領域を補間する...計算は明確な結果を出さない。だが、私の記憶地図に興味があるのはなぜだろう？その重要なデータポイントをいくつか知っているのか？」
languages.original_text: "Interpolating an area of uncertainty... The calculation does not produce clear results. But why the interest in my memory map? Are you familiar with some of its key data points?"

traits.locale_text: 「不確実性の領域を補間する...計算は明確な結果を出さない。だが、私の記憶地図に興味があるのはなぜだろう？その重要なデータポイントをいくつか知っているのか？」
